title: Phase 6 Review Result
_comment: 이식본 — 원본은 interactive/core/procedures/schemas/, insufficient_context는 게이트 전용 additive 확장 (scripts/review-gate step 1, phases/3-review-gate/PLANNING.md §3.1/§3.6). 원본 스키마는 무수정.
description: Written by the read-only reviewer to .sc4sap/program/{PROG}/review-result.json after running review-checklist.md. The worker applies fixes; the reviewer never writes to the SAP system. Phase 8 requires verdict PASS with reviewed_spec_sha256 matching approval.json.spec_sha256.

reviewed_spec_sha256.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the spec.md version this review judged against. Must equal review-request.json.spec_sha256.

verdict.description: FAIL when one or more MAJOR findings exist. PASS when zero MAJOR findings (MINOR findings may still be listed).

findings.description: Every violation found, MINOR and MAJOR. Empty array on a clean PASS.

bucket.description: Checklist bucket: B1 ALV+UI (§1-§2), B2 Logic Hygiene (§3, §8), B3 Structure+Naming (§4-§7), B4 Platform+Config (§9-§12).

severity.description: MINOR = non-blocking, worker fixes without re-review. MAJOR = blocks completion, requires fix + re-review. Note (review-gate port): the review-gate's own decision logic (scripts/review-gate/verdict.mjs) recognizes the wider §3.6 ordering BLOCKER > MAJOR > MINOR > INFO and judges severity legitimacy against that ordering rather than this narrower trackB enum — this field's enum is left as ported (additive-only policy for this file).

object.description: Name of the object the violation was found in.

finding.description: What is violated, citing the convention file/section and the offending code location or excerpt.

iteration.description: Which review iteration this result belongs to (optional).

insufficient_context.description: Review-gate-only additive extension (not present in the original trackB schema). true = the reviewer declares it lacks enough context to judge (spec §4.1-5 step 5, PLANNING §3.1) — the gate classifies this as INSUFFICIENT_CONTEXT before computing a severity-based verdict.
